title: oldenlandia longipetala
intro: Oldenlandia longipetala, also known as Hairy Beggar ticks, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia longipetala include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs to make tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
